style: clean technical block diagram, USENIX paper figure, white background, sans-serif labels, rounded rectangles, directional arrows with labels, two clearly delineated swimlanes for the two processes
orientation: landscape, two columns: main process on the left, engine subprocess on the right, IPC queues vertically stacked between them
title: KV-pointer recall: agent loop + inference engine over IPC

components.label: Agent loop
components.sub: ReAct-style: assemble prompt, call engine, parse tool calls, append tool obs

components.label: Compaction policy
components.sub:
decides which obs to compact and which to recall;
computes obs_id with the engine's tokenizer

components.label: Prompt renderer
components.sub:
produces the next prompt with placeholders
in place of compacted observations

components.label: Scheduler
components.sub:
drains all four IPC queues each step;
allocates fresh blocks; splices request block tables (REPLACE)

components.label: GPU worker
components.sub:
executes capture / restore / rotate ops
against per-layer page tensors

components.label: Paged KV cache (GPU)
components.sub:
per-layer K and V page tensors;
blocks indexed by physical_block_id
components.note: draw as a stack of layered slabs to suggest per-layer pages

components.label: Block pool + prefix-cache hash table
Side cache (CPU pinned)
components.sub:
obs_id (content hash) -> KV bytes per layer;
holds released observation KV between compaction and recall

components.label: Rotary kernel (engine-shipped)
components.sub:
applies R(delta) per token in place;
reused via the identity R(p+delta) = R(delta) o R(p)

edges.label:
read / write K and V
(capture, restore, rotate)

CPU pinned -> fresh GPU blocks
on restore

in-place K rotation
by delta tokens

annotations.text: four append-only queues; scheduler drains at start of each step
auxiliary chain-hash entries are inserted, never removed

released GPU blocks fall to LRU free queue;
KV bytes survive on CPU pinned memory

no model forward pass;
per-layer tensor op only

arrow_styles.ipc_write: dashed arrow into a stacked-cylinder queue
arrow_styles.ipc_read: dashed arrow out of a stacked-cylinder queue
arrow_styles.request: thin solid arrow with double-line head

shapes.hash_table: small rounded rectangle with grid lines
